zh.lifeSummary: 當Aimee Adeline Albini於大約1040年出生在法國諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼時，她的父親Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny32歲，母親Adeliza du Plessis14歲。她於1069年與Sir Richard Talbot在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1106年在法國諾門迪享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aimee Adeline Albini于大约1040年出生在法国諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼时，她的父亲Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny32岁，母亲Adeliza du Plessis14岁。她于1069年与Sir Richard Talbot在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1106年在法国諾門迪享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Pasquale, Aldo, Amalio, Americo, Armando, Carlo, Caterina, Claudio, Gino, Mario, Maurizio, Nichola, Nicola, Severino, Vittorio.
patronymic or plural form of   Albino  .

variants.name: Albino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Manuel, Ana, Carlos, Julio, Luis, Raul, Ruben, Alfonso, Andres, Angel.  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Giovanni, Luigi, Sal, Santo, Saverio, Ubalda.

nameMeanings.name: Aimee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: originally a vernacular nickname meaning ‘beloved’, from the past participle of French aimer ‘to love’ (Latin amare; compare Amy ). It has been in use in French since the Middle Ages, although it has never been very common. It is now also used, with or without the accent, as a given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Aimi
meanings: originally a vernacular nickname meaning ‘beloved’, from the past participle of French aimer ‘to love’ (Latin amare; compare Amy ). It has been in use in French since the Middle Ages, although it has never been very common. It is now also used, with or without the accent, as a given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Amy
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Aimee Adeline Albini was born about 1040, in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, was 32 and her mother, Adeliza du Plessis, was 14. She married Sir Richard Talbot in 1069, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1106, in Normandy, France, at the age of 67.

Elle a épousé Sir Richard Talbot en 1069, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1106, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Aimee Adeline Albiniが約1040年にフランスノーマンディマンチェサイント-マルティン-ド'アウビグニーで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubignyは32歳，母Adeliza du Plessisは14歳であった。1069年にイギリスイギリスでSir Richard Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1106年にフランスノーマンディで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aimee Adeline Albini(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 세인트-마틴-드'오비그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza du Plessis(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1069년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Richard Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1106년 프랑스 노먼디에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aimee Adeline Albini родилась около 1040 г. в местности сеинт-мартин-д'аубигни, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza du Plessis, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Talbot в 1069 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1106 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.
